query: SELECT configKey, CHAR_LENGTH(configValue) as valueLen, LEFT(configValue, 20) as preview FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE '%STRIPE%' OR configKey LIKE '%stripe%' ORDER BY configKey;
